meaning: n.氙(惰性气体的一种,元素符号Xe)
examples: The Zeplin detectors are filled with liquid xenon.
One of these is the Large Underground Xenon (Lux) experiment.
Though costlier, xenon allows a discharge lamp to start far more quickly.
The Nokia Lumia 928 also comes with powerful Xenon flash to freeze the moment.
Strip the electrons off a stream of xenon gas atoms so that they become charged (ions).
